# SafeTrekr -- llms.txt
# https://safetrekr.com/.well-known/llms.txt
# Last updated: 2026-03-24

> SafeTrekr is a travel risk management platform that provides real-time
> intelligence, professional trip reviews, and duty-of-care compliance for
> organizations of every size.

## Name

SafeTrekr

## URL

https://safetrekr.com

## Description

SafeTrekr delivers professional travel risk management for K-12 schools,
universities, churches, and corporate organizations. Every trip is
professionally reviewed against real-time threat intelligence so that travel
coordinators, risk managers, and administrators can fulfill their duty of care
with confidence.

The platform combines automated risk scoring, live threat feeds, interactive
risk maps, and expert analyst review into a single workflow that replaces
spreadsheets, email chains, and guesswork.

## Key Features

- Real-time travel risk intelligence with automated threat monitoring
- Professional trip review by certified risk analysts
- Interactive risk maps powered by live geopolitical and safety data
- Duty-of-care compliance documentation and audit trails
- Traveler tracking and emergency communication tools
- Customizable risk policies per organization type
- Incident response planning and crisis management support
- Integration with travel booking systems and itinerary data

## Solutions

- K-12 Schools: Field trip and student travel risk management
- Higher Education: Study-abroad and faculty travel oversight
- Churches: Mission trip and congregational travel safety
- Corporate: Business travel risk and employee duty of care

## Pricing

Visit https://safetrekr.com/pricing for current plan details.
Plans are available for small teams through enterprise organizations.

## Contact

- Website: https://safetrekr.com
- Demo request: https://safetrekr.com/demo
- Contact form: https://safetrekr.com/contact
- Email: hello@safetrekr.com

## Technical Details

- Platform type: SaaS (Software as a Service)
- Deployment: Cloud-hosted, accessible via web browser
- Data security: SOC 2 Type II compliant infrastructure
- API: RESTful API available for enterprise integrations
